name: ERPNext Stock V2 Buying Receipt Invoice Lock Test

parameters.dataJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ supplier_name: $node["Build Buying Stock Lock Context"].json.supplierName, supplier_type: "Company", supplier_group: "All Supplier Groups" }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ item_group_name: $node["Build Buying Stock Lock Context"].json.itemGroup, parent_item_group: "All Item Groups", is_group: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ warehouse_name: $node["Build Buying Stock Lock Context"].json.warehouseName, parent_warehouse: $node["Build Buying Stock Lock Context"].json.parentWarehouse, company: $node["Build Buying Stock Lock Context"].json.company, is_group: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ item_code: $node["Build Buying Stock Lock Context"].json.itemCode, item_name: $node["Build Buying Stock Lock Context"].json.itemCode, item_group: $node["Create Buying Lock Item Group"].json.name, stock_uom: "Unit", is_stock_item: 1, is_purchase_item: 1, is_sales_item: 0, valuation_rate: $node["Build Buying Stock Lock Context"].json.rate, standard_rate: $node["Build Buying Stock Lock Context"].json.rate }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ supplier: $node["Create Buying Lock Supplier"].json.name, company: $node["Build Buying Stock Lock Context"].json.company, posting_date: $node["Build Buying Stock Lock Context"].json.postingDate, set_warehouse: $node["Create Buying Lock Warehouse"].json.name, items: [{ item_code: $node["Create Buying Lock Item"].json.name, qty: $node["Build Buying Stock Lock Context"].json.qty, rate: $node["Build Buying Stock Lock Context"].json.rate, warehouse: $node["Create Buying Lock Warehouse"].json.name }] }) }}

parameters.filtersJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ item_code: $node["Create Buying Lock Item"].json.name, warehouse: $node["Create Buying Lock Warehouse"].json.name }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ voucher_type: "Purchase Receipt", voucher_no: $node["Create Buying Purchase Receipt"].json.name }) }}

Return Safe Buying Stock Lock Summary
